title: Gallery
text:
President Donald J. Trump participates in a Medal of Honor ceremony
President Donald Trump delivers his State of the Union address
The U.S. Olympic Men’s Hockey Team visit the White House
First Lady Melania Trump presents her 2025 inaugural gown to the First Ladies Collection at the Smithsonian National Museum of American History
President Donald Trump delivers remarks at a dinner for the nation’s governors
President Donald Trump delivers remarks on the Supreme Court ruling on tariffs
President Donald Trump delivers remarks on the economy at the Coosa Steel Corporation in Rome, Georgia
